text: Evaluate telephone-style voice API for call-like interaction
description: When voice work resumes, evaluate a telephone-style API approach so voice interaction feels like a phone call rather than a generic push-to-talk UI. Use Grok-like call interaction as inspiration, compare the implementation surface against the current mobile/voice experiments, and decide how this should fit Aimparency's local-first architecture.

status.comment: Future voice direction captured from user guidance. Not a release blocker.
